title: SYNTHETIC temporal FAR - version 2 (on/after the demo amendment)
description: SYNTHETIC fixture (M4-T003 RH-S6): version 2 of the demo FAR rule governing dates ON/AFTER 2024-01-01. Evaluating as_of a date on/after 2024-01-01 selects this version (FAR 2.0) instead of version 1 (FAR 1.0) - a genuine before/after effective-date transition. Illustrative value; not a Verified determination.

citations.quote: SYNTHETIC (not verbatim from any source): for M4-T003 engine-hardening demonstrations only - effective-date temporal selection and a compliance pass/fail determination. Illustrative values; never a legal statement.

inputs.name: zoning_district
inputs.description: District governing the lot (scope via applicability).

outputs.name: max_floor_area_sq_ft
outputs.description: Maximum floor area = lot area x FAR.

limitations: SYNTHETIC temporal-versioning demonstration; illustrative value; requires official capture + G6 before any use.
